name: Oura Ring
description: Connect your Oura Ring account and enable access to your wellness data in apps and automations. In
longDescription: Oura Ring MCP server for health and wellness data. Access sleep scores, activity data, readiness, heart rate, workouts, SpO2, VO2 max, stress, resilience, and tags from your Oura Ring via the Oura API v2.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: How did I sleep last night?
Show my activity summary for this week
Get my heart rate data for the last 7 days
